title: Smooth Server
description:
This modpack will optimize your cheap server performance.

Check the Free Minecraft Hosts List (FMHL)!
body:
# Optimize Your Minecraft Server with the Smooth Server Modpack ![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/NnAGuoCJ?color=231bd96a&logo=Modrinth&style=flat-square) ![Mod Count](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/850902.svg) ![Enviroment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Enviroment-Server-purple) ![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-lightyellow?logo=data:image/png;base64,) ![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Forge-lightyellow?logo=data:image/png;base64,) ![Minecraft Versions](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=Versions%20Available&message=1.17.1%20to%201.21.10&color=231bd96a&style=flat-square&logo=appveyor&logo=Modrinth) ![Smooth Server Logo](https://i.imgur.com/LBozX0T.png) ### Elevate Your Minecraft Server Performance Are you tired of lag and slow performance on your Minecraft server? The Smooth Server Modpack on Modrinth has your back! Designed to enhance your gaming experience, this modpack is compatible with Minecraft versions 1.17.1 to 1.20.3. Powered by Fabric (or Forge), it ensures a seamless and lag-free adventure in the blocky world. ---

Looking for Free Server Hosting Options?

Check out our curated list on FMHL!

![Server Hosting](https://i.imgur.com/g82CSmo.png) --- ### What's Inside the Modpack? Our carefully curated modpack includes a collection of mods that tackle bugs and supercharge server features: - **Alternate Current**: Optimize redstone dust for reduced lag and improved performance. - **Carpet**: Enhance your control over various game mechanics with this versatile mod. - **Carpet-Fixes**: Fix client-side bugs when using Carpet on servers. - **Chunky**: Pre-generate chunks quickly and efficiently. - **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine**: Improve chunk generation and loading performance. - **Debugify**: Squash Minecraft bugs listed on the tracker. - **Fabric API**: A foundation for essential hooks and features. - **FerriteCore**: Reduce memory usage for a smoother gaming experience. - **Krypton**: Optimize Minecraft networking for faster performance. - **Ksyxis**: Speed up world loading and chunk generation. - **LazyDFU**: Optimize DataFixerUpper for improved efficiency. - **Let Me Despawn**: Reduce entity lag by allowing mobs to despawn. - **Lithium**: Enhance server performance without altering vanilla mechanics. - **MCMTFabric**: Enable multithreading for various game elements. - **MemoryLeakFix**: Fix memory leaks for both client and server. - **No Chat Reports**: Eliminate chat message tracking and reporting. - **No Unused Chunks**: Shrink world size by discarding unused chunks. - **ServerCore**: Optimize your Minecraft server for better performance and less lag. - **Smooth Boot**: Improve Minecraft's loading speed with parallel execution. - **spark**: Diagnose performance and memory issues with ease. - **Very Many Players**: Boost server performance for high player counts. - **TCDCommons API**: A library for Minecraft modding that speeds up development. *And More...* ### A Lag-Free Minecraft Awaits With the Smooth Server Modpack, you'll witness a significant improvement in your Minecraft server's performance. Say goodbye to lag and hello to a smoother, more enjoyable gaming experience. Don't wait any longer—download our modpack now on Modrinth! ## Need Help? If you encounter any issues or have questions, feel free to contact me on Discord: myuui --- ### Mod List: Here's a closer look at some of the key mods included in the pack: - **No Chat Reports** (by Aizistral): Say goodbye to chat message tracking and reporting. - **Fabric API** (by modmuss50): Enhance your modding capabilities with essential hooks and features. - **YetAnotherConfigLib** (by XanderIsDev): A modding library focused on config functionality. - **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)** (by ishlandmc): Improve chunk generation and loading performance. - **Krypton** (by tuxed): Optimize Minecraft's networking for a smoother experience. - **Let Me Despawn** (by frikinjay1): Reduce entity lag by allowing mobs to despawn. - **Debugify** (by XanderIsDev): Fix Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker. - **ServerCore** (by Wesley8081): Optimize your Minecraft server for better performance and less lag. - **Alternate Current** (by SpaceWalkerRS): Optimize redstone dust for reduced lag. - **spark** (by Iucko): Diagnose performance and memory issues with ease. - **Very Many Players (Fabric)** (by ishlandmc): Boost server performance for high player counts. - **Lithium (Fabric)** (by jellysquid3_): Improve various systems without changing vanilla mechanics. - **LazyDFU** (by tuxed): Optimize DataFixerUpper for better efficiency. - **MemoryLeakFix** (by FX_PR0CESS): Fix memory leaks for both client and server. - **Ksyxis** (by VidTu): Speed up world loading by not loading nearby chunks every time. - **Carpet-Fixes** (by FX_PR0CESS): Fix server-side functionality and client-side bugs. - **Smooth Boot (Fabric)** (by UltimateBoomer): Improve Minecraft's loading speed. - **TCDCommons API** (by TheCSDev): A library for mod development that speeds up coding. - **MCMTFabric** (by himekifee): Enable multithreading for improved performance. - **FerriteCore (Fabric)** (by malte0811): Reduce memory usage in Minecraft. - **Chunky (Fabric)** (by pop4959): Pre-generate chunks quickly and efficiently. - **No Unused Chunks** (by TheCSDev): Reduce the size of Minecraft worlds by discarding unused chunks. *And many more...* --- Last Updated: 28/May/25 23:15 CET UTC+1
